testcase.name: feature

failure.message: java.lang.AssertionError: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.xpath: //td[@class='td_tool_bar_icon']/input' (tried for 50 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) expected [true] but found [false]
